name: Csl Limited
analysis: CSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$114.9900, stop A$95.9112, target A$126.4900 (0.60:1) — then trail it.
